title: The Big Cheese All-Weather Block Bait - 10g x 15 Kills Mice and Rats Damp-Proof, Weather-Resistant & Rat & Mouse Killer Grain Bait Sachet - 25g x 6 Kills Mice Pre-Measured Chew Through
features: Product 1: BAIT STATION REQUIRED: Use The Big Cheese Rat & Mouse Bait Station when baiting rats and mice with poisons, this is required by UK law
Product 1: EFFECTIVE: Ready-to-use moisture-resistant poison bait blocks – mouse and rat bait stays fresh in damp or wet weather
Product 1: VALUE PACK: 15 Bait Blocks allows for multiple coverage or repeated use
Product 1: WHERE TO USE: Suitable for use indoors in the home or outdoors around buildings
Product 2: BAIT STATION REQUIRED: Use The Big Cheese Rat and Mouse Bait Station (sold separately) By law, these sachets must be used in a tamper-resistant bait station
Product 2: EASY-TO-USE: Six grain bait sachets are pre-measured and wrapped, no bait handling required
Product 2: EFFECTIVE: Rats and mice chew through the sachets to get to the bait
Product 2: HIGHLY PALATABLE BAIT: No spill rodent killer bait maximises bait take to ensure a lethal dose to rats and mice
description: The Big Cheese All-Weather Block Bait - 10g x 15 Kills Mice and Rats Damp-Proof, Weather-Resistant, Blue Difenacoum Ready-to-use bait for the control of rats and mice in and around buildings To be used in tamper-resistant bait stations Moisture-resistant bait blocks stay fresh and highly palatable in both wet and dry weather conditions Universal block fits all bait stations This advanced formula has been specially designed with the highest quality food materials, flavours and preservatives to create a highly palatable bait that kills rodents in just a few feeds The Big Cheese Home Choice range provides proven and effective control of rats and mice using 50% less poison than previous formulations, making it the ideal choice for use in and around the home The Big Cheese Rat & Mouse Killer Grain Bait Sachet - 25g x 6 Kills Mice Pre-Measured Chew Through Sachet Difenacoum, Blue Ready-to-use bait for the control of rats and mice in and around buildings To be used in tamper-resistant bait stations Highly palatable chew-thru bait packs for use in and around buildings Pre-measured and ready to place inside a bait station No bait handling required This advanced formula has been specially designed with the highest quality food materials, flavours and preservatives to create a highly palatable bait that kills rodents in just a few feeds The Big Cheese Home Choice range provides proven and effective control of rats and mice using 50% less poison than previous formulations, making it the ideal choice for use in and around the home
